name: chr2_2p23_LRRTM4_SD
description: 2p23 SD module spanning LRRTM4 and surrounding LRRTM-family paralogs. Acts as a low-copy repeat substrate for rare submicroscopic 2p23 rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: Two SDs of 30-80 kb at ~93% identity flanking the LRRTM4 unique segment; LRRTM1/2/3/4 family disperses additional paralog signal across the genome.
